## Overview

Acme Example is a B2B SaaS company building AI infrastructure [Source: test-e2e-chunker-takes-strip-test-ts]. It was founded by [Alice Example](people/alice-example) [Source: test-e2e-chunker-takes-strip-test-ts].

## People

- **Alice Example** – Founder [Source: test-e2e-chunker-takes-strip-test-ts]
- **Marco Example** – Held engineering roles at Acme, progressing from engineer (Jan 2026) to VP of Engineering (Apr 2026) and ultimately to CTO (Sep 2026) [Source: test-e2e-think-trajectory-pglite-test-ts]

## Funding & milestones

- Monthly Recurring Revenue (MRR) reached $50,000 by January 2026 and grew to $100,000 by June 2026 [Source: test-e2e-think-trajectory-pglite-test-ts]
- As of April 2026, a venture analysis noted a 70‑confidence bet that Acme would close a Series A round in Q4 2026, with *fund‑a* expected to lead the round (75‑confidence) [Source: test-fixtures-calibration-extract-takes-corpus-meeting-2026-04-10-fundraise-fund-a-gradeable-claims-json]
